work.title: Software Engineer
descriptions: Led development of an enterprise Digital Twin platform integrating Matterport 3D twins and Neo4j across multiple industrial sites
Built and extended ETL pipelines ingesting operations data from third-party systems (procedures, sensor data, engineering drawings) into Neo4j, powering the Digital Twin and AI chat assistants
Reduced time to ship new AI agents from days to hours, enabling the team to rapidly scale the platform
Eliminated manual deployments across all agent services through automated CI/CD and infrastructure-as-code
Established Claude Code as the team's primary development workflow, setting up the codebase and tooling to maximize AI-assisted development

work.title: Software Engineer
descriptions: Applied TDD and Clean Architecture to produce a maintainable, well-tested codebase
Managed state-based SQL Server migrations, ensuring safe and reproducible schema changes
Delivered production React UIs and Node.js REST APIs from design through deployment
Provisioned Azure infrastructure with Terraform, standardizing environments and eliminating manual configuration
Maintained CI/CD pipelines ensuring reliable automated delivery across the team

projects.name: Spectrum Analyzer
description: Built a real-time 32-band FFT spectrum visualizer running on a Raspberry Pi
Integrated on-device song identification using Olaf audio fingerprinting

projects.name: Photography Infrastructure
description: Built a serverless image processing pipeline that auto-converts full-res uploads to web and thumbnail formats on arrival
Provisioned S3, Lambda, and IAM resources as code via AWS SAM with CI/CD through GitHub Actions

projects.name: Astrorpheus
description: Designed and implemented 3D point cloud viewer using React Three Fiber
Won 1st place at the NASA Space Apps Challenge, Wichita, KS
